session.user: Run `prettier --check .github/workflows/one-shot.yml` and report results. If there are formatting issues, report what they are.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting of the one-shot.yml workflow file.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check formatting of one-shot.yml with prettier

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All matched files use Prettier code style!
The `.github/workflows/one-shot.yml` file is properly formatted and requires no changes.
